genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 2 June 2025

species.citation: (Blume) Engl. , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 14 (1891) 376 ; Merrill, EPFP 4 (1926) 244; de Wilde, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 430; ≡ Modecca cordifolia Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 939.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Nicobar Isls, Philippines, Vietnam. JOLO (photos), PALAWAN.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 331 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 117. = Adenia quadrifida Merr. , PJS 13c (1918) 94 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 117.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BASILAN, MINDANAO: Lanao del Norte (photos), Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur, SULU ARCHIPELAGO.

species.citation: (Blume) Koord. , Exkurs.-Fl. Java 2 (1912) 637 ; de Wilde, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 426; ≡ Modecca heterophylla Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 940. = Adenia longifolia Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 330 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 117. = Adenia palmatifolia Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 330 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 117. = Adenia zucca (Blanco) Merr. , Sp. Blancoanae (1918) 276 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 276; ≡ Passiflora zucca Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 648. = Adenia coccinea (Blanco) Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 421; ≡ Modecca coccinea Blanco , Fl. Filip., 2nd Ed. (1845) 453.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Australia, Bismarck Arch, Borneo, Cambodia, China, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, New Guinea, Nicobar Isls, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. BABUYAN ISLS, BASILAN, CEBU, LUZON: Abra (photos), Apayao, Aurora (photos), Bataan, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya, Pangasinan, Zambales, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, POLILLO, SULU ARCHIPELAGO.
species.notes: Forest and scrub, often in secondary vegetation. 0-1000m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 3 May 2024

species.notes: Naturalized (J.V. LaFrankie, pers. comm.). Along roads.

species.citation: Sims , Bot. Mag. 45 (1818) t.1989 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 336; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 118. = Passiflora minima Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 647, nom. illeg., non L.
species.notes: Naturalized and possibly invasive (Pelser & Barcelona, pers. obs.).

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 959 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 336; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 118; Cortez et al., Check List 19 (2023) 989; Type: LINN-1070.24 (lecto).
species.distribution: America. APULIT, BANTAYAN, BILIRAN, CEBU, LEYTE, LUZON: Isabela (photos), Rizal, Zambales (photos), MINDANAO, MINDORO (photos), PALAWAN, PANAY (photos), SAMAR (photos), SIARGAO.
species.notes: Naturalized in thickets and waste places (Merrill 1912, 1923).

species.citation: Reinw. ex Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 938; Type: C.G.C. Reinwardt 1435 (L, holo?, iso?). var. teysmanniana (Miq.) W.J.de Wilde, Fl. Males., 1st Ser. 7 (1972) 413; ≡ Disemma horsfieldii var. teysmanniana Miq., Fl. Ned. Ind. 1(1) (1856) 700. = Passiflora philippinensis Elmer, LPB 1 (1908) 326; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 118. Distribution: China, Indochina, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Philippines, Sulawesi. LUZON: Benguet, Isabela, Mountain Province. Native.
species.distribution: China, Indochina, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Philippines, Sulawesi. LUZON: Benguet, Ilocos Sur, Isabela, Mountain Province, MINDORO.
America. BATAN, CALAYAN, LUZON: Ilocos Norte (photos).
species.notes: Naturalized along roads and trails through forest.
